description: NIQ Global Intelligence Plc is a consumer intelligence company that provides an AI-powered platform for analyzing shopping data. Its services offer insights into global consumer behavior, supporting strategic and operational decisions for brands, retailers, and other clients. The company operates across three geographical segments: the Americas (North and Latin America), EMEA (Europe, the Middle East, and Africa), and APAC (Asia and the western Pacific). NIQ was founded on June 6, 2017, and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
